name: Shadow Demon
description: Who toys with demons will find himself toyed with. Shadow Demon Upon returning, Shadow Demon creates illusions of the banished hero under his control. These illusion deals a portion of the affected hero's damage and receive additional incoming damage. Grants the created illusions base attack damage bonus.

abilities.name: Menace
abilities.description: Imbues attacks with an offensive stacking debuff that amplifies incoming damage taken by the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Shadow Servant
abilities.description: These servants are illusions that deals a portion of dying enemy hero's damage and receives additional incoming damage.

abilities.name: Disruption
abilities.description: Upon returning, Shadow Demon creates illusions of the banished hero under his control. These illusion deals a portion of the affected hero's damage and receive additional incoming damage. Grants the created illusions base attack damage bonus.

abilities.name: Disseminate
abilities.description: Whenever the affected unit takes damage, all enemy units, including the target itself if it is an enemy, also receive a portion of that damage. Since the primary unit-targeted enemy is affected by the damage shared, this effectively amplifies the damage applied to it.

abilities.name: Shadow Poison
abilities.description: Deals damage in a straight line and applies additional stack damage if the debuff is present. The first component of poison damage scales exponentially for the first five stacks on the enemy unit.

abilities.name: Demonic Cleanse
abilities.description: Dispels debuffs continuously on the affected allied unit, then heals it at the end of the duration.
